SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript:
WITH SlimClient AS(
SELECT 
   IFNULL(clientKey,-1) AS clientKey
  ,IFNULL(LOWER(clientCode),'') AS clientCode
FROM dimClient
),
SlimProvider AS(
SELECT 
   IFNULL(providerKey,-1) AS providerKey
  ,IFNULL(ProviderId,'') AS ProviderId
FROM dimProvider
WHERE
IsCurrent = 1
),
SlimMember AS(
SELECT 
   IFNULL(memberKey,-1) AS memberKey
  ,IFNULL(PlanMemberId,'') AS PlanMemberId
FROM dimMember
WHERE
IsCurrent = 1
),
SlimMonth AS(
SELECT 
  IFNULL(monthKey,'011900') AS monthKey
FROM dimMonth
),
SlimMemberRoster AS(
SELECT 
   IFNULL(reportMonth,'011900') AS reportMonth
  ,IFNULL(planMemberID,'') AS PlanMemberId
  ,IFNULL(planID,'') AS PlanId
FROM MemberRoster
),
SlimReportBase AS(
SELECT 
   IFNULL(ReportMonth,'011900') AS ReportMonth
  ,IFNULL(PlanMemberId,'') AS PlanMemberId
FROM ReportBase
),
SlimAlertGroup AS(
SELECT 
   IFNULL(alertGroupID,'') AS alertGroupID
  ,IFNULL(alertGroupCode,'') AS alertGroupCode
FROM alertGroup
),
SlimAlertResponseOption AS(
SELECT 
   IFNULL(alertResponseOptionID,'') AS alertResponseOptionID
  ,IFNULL(alertResponseOptionText,'') AS alertResponseOptionText
FROM alertResponseOption  
),
SlimAlertWorkflowQuery AS(
SELECT  
   IFNULL(CDIAlertEntityDetailID,'') AS CDIAlertEntityDetailID
  ,IFNULL(CDIAlertWorkflowQueryID,'') AS CDIAlertWorkflowQueryID
FROM CDIAlertWorkflowQuery
),
SlimCDIAlertQueryResponse AS(
SELECT 
   IFNULL(cdiAlertQueryResponseID,'') AS cdiAlertQueryResponseID
  ,IFNULL(cdiAlertQueryResponseDescription,'') AS cdiAlertQueryResponseDescription
FROM cdiAlertQueryResponse 
),
CleanCDIAlert AS(
SELECT     
   IFNULL(al.clientCode,'') AS clientCode
  ,IFNULL(al.planMemberID,'')  AS planMemberID
  ,IFNULL(al.reportMonth,'011900') AS reportMonth
  ,IFNULL(al.pcpProviderID,'')  AS pcpProviderID
  ,IFNULL(al.apptProviderID,'') AS apptProviderID
  ,al.alertGroupID AS alertGroupID
  ,al.alertResponseOptionID AS alertResponseOptionID
  ,al.CDIAlertEntityDetailID AS CDIAlertEntityDetailID
  ,al.cdiAlertQueryResponseID AS cdiAlertQueryResponseID
  ,IFNULL(al.LOB,'') AS LOB
  ,IFNULL(al.hcc,'') AS hcc
  ,IFNULL(al.alertsDistributedFlag,0) AS alertsDistributedFlag
  ,IFNULL(al.alertsReturnedFlag,0) AS alertsReturnedFlag
  ,IFNULL(al.isConditionAddressed,0) AS isConditionAddressed
  ,IFNULL(al.isConditionIdentified,0) AS isConditionIdentified
  ,IFNULL(al.cdiReceivedDate,'1\/1\/1900') AS cdiReceivedDate
  ,IFNULL(al.appointmentDate,'1\/1\/1900') AS appointmentDate
  ,al.alertID AS alertID
FROM cdiAlertLine al
),
BaseData AS(
SELECT 
   m.monthKey
  ,c.ClientKey AS clientKey
  ,mem.memberKey
  ,mr.PlanId AS planID
  ,CASE WHEN NULLIF(rb.PlanMemberId,'') IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS isMemberActive
  ,al.LOB AS lineOfBusiness
  ,CASE WHEN NULLIF(rb.PlanMemberId,'') IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS isInReportBase
  ,pcp.ProviderKey AS pcpProviderKey
  ,appt.ProviderKey AS apptProviderKey
  ,al.alertsDistributedFlag
  ,al.alertsReturnedFlag
  ,al.isConditionAddressed
  ,al.isConditionIdentified
  ,al.hcc
  ,CASE WHEN al.alertsReturnedFlag = 1 AND DATEDIFF(al.cdiReceivedDate,al.appointmentDate) <= 14 AND ars.alertResponseOptionText IN('Yes', 'No', 'Not Addressed') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS alertsReturnedCompliant
  ,CASE 
    WHEN al.alertsReturnedFlag = 1 AND DATEDIFF(al.cdiReceivedDate,al.appointmentDate) <= 14 AND ars.alertResponseOptionText IN('Yes', 'No', 'Not Addressed') THEN al.planMemberId 
    ELSE NULL
   END AS IsIncentiveUMARQualifiedPlanMemberId
  ,CASE 
    WHEN al.alertsReturnedFlag = 1 AND DATEDIFF(al.cdiReceivedDate,al.appointmentDate) <= 14 AND ars.alertResponseOptionText IN('Yes', 'No', 'Not Addressed') THEN al.alertId 
    ELSE NULL
   END AS isIncentiveQualifiedAlertsAlertId
  ,CASE WHEN ag.alertGroupCode = 'DC' AND al.isConditionIdentified = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS droppedConditionsIdentified
  ,CASE WHEN ag.alertGroupCode = 'DC' AND al.isConditionIdentified = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS droppedConditionsAddressed
  ,CASE WHEN ag.alertGroupCode = 'DC' AND ars.alertResponseOptionText = 'Yes' AND al.isConditionAddressed = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS droppedConditionsYesResponse
  ,CASE WHEN ag.alertGroupCode = 'DC' AND ars.alertResponseOptionText = 'No' AND al.isConditionAddressed = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS droppedConditionsNoResponse
  ,CASE WHEN ag.alertGroupCode = 'DC' AND ars.alertResponseOptionText = NULL AND al.isConditionAddressed = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS droppedConditionsNullResponse
  ,CASE WHEN ag.alertGroupCode = 'OPP' AND al.isConditionIdentified = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS opportunitiesIdentified
  ,CASE WHEN ag.alertGroupCode = 'OPP' AND al.isConditionAddressed = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS opportunitiesAddressed
  ,CASE WHEN ag.alertGroupCode = 'OPP' AND ars.alertResponseOptionText = 'Yes' AND al.isConditionAddressed = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS opportunitiesYesResponse
  ,CASE WHEN ag.alertGroupCode = 'OPP' AND ars.alertResponseOptionText = 'No' AND al.isConditionAddressed = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS opportunitiesNoResponse
  ,CASE WHEN ag.alertGroupCode = 'OPP' AND ars.alertResponseOptionText = NULL AND al.isConditionAddressed = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS opportunitiesnullResponse
  ,CASE WHEN ag.alertGroupCode = 'STAR' AND al.isConditionIdentified = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS starsIdentified
  ,CASE WHEN ag.alertGroupCode = 'STAR' AND al.isConditionAddressed = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS starsAddressed
  ,CASE WHEN al.CDIAlertQueryResponseID IN('50','100') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS alertsDistributedWithQueries
  ,CASE WHEN al.alertsReturnedFlag = 1 AND al.CDIAlertQueryResponseID IS NOT NULL AND DATEDIFF(al.cdiReceivedDate,al.appointmentDate) <= 14 AND ars.alertResponseOptionText IN('Yes', 'No', 'Not Addressed') THEN al.alertId ELSE NULL END AS alertsReturnedCompliantWithQueries
  ,CASE WHEN awq.CDIAlertWorkflowQueryID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS queriesDistributed
  ,CASE WHEN al.CDIAlertQueryResponseID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS queriesReturned
  ,CASE WHEN aqr.cdiAlertQueryResponseDescription IN('Returned- Addended MR') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS queriesReturnedAddendedMR
  ,CASE WHEN aqr.cdiAlertQueryResponseDescription IN('Returned- No Updates Made to MR') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS queriesReturnedNoUpdateMR
  ,CASE WHEN ag.alertGroupCode = 'STAR' AND al.alertsDistributedFlag = 1 THEN alertID ELSE NULL END AS alertsDistributedWithStars
  ,CASE WHEN ag.alertGroupCode = 'STAR' AND al.alertsReturnedFlag = 1 THEN alertID ELSE NULL END AS alertsReturnedWithStars
  ,CASE WHEN ag.alertGroupCode = 'STAR' AND al.alertsReturnedFlag = 1 AND DATEDIFF(al.cdiReceivedDate,al.appointmentDate) <= 14 AND ars.alertResponseOptionText IN('Yes', 'No', 'Not Addressed') THEN alertID ELSE NULL END AS alertsReturnedCompliantWithStars
  ,CASE WHEN ag.alertGroupCode = 'STAR' AND al.alertsReturnedFlag = 1 AND DATEDIFF(al.cdiReceivedDate,al.appointmentDate) <= 14 AND ars.alertResponseOptionText IN('Yes', 'No', 'Not Addressed') THEN alertID ELSE NULL END AS starsReturnedCompliant
  ,CASE WHEN ag.alertGroupCode = 'STAR' AND al.isConditionAddressed = 1 AND DATEDIFF(al.cdiReceivedDate,al.appointmentDate) <= 14 AND ars.alertResponseOptionText IN('Yes', 'No', 'Not Addressed') THEN alertID ELSE NULL END AS starsAddressedReturnedCompliant
FROM CleanCDIAlert al
  LEFT JOIN SlimClient c
    ON NULLIF(al.clientCode,'') = NULLIF(c.clientCode,'')
  LEFT JOIN SlimMember mem
    ON NULLIF(al.planMemberID,'') = NULLIF(mem.planMemberID,'')
  LEFT JOIN SlimMonth m
    ON NULLIF(al.reportMonth,'') = NULLIF(m.monthKey,'')
  LEFT JOIN SlimProvider pcp
    ON NULLIF(al.pcpProviderID,'') = NULLIF(pcp.providerID,'')
  LEFT JOIN SlimProvider appt
    ON NULLIF(al.apptProviderID,'') = NULLIF(appt.providerID,'')
  LEFT JOIN SlimMemberRoster mr
    ON NULLIF(al.reportMonth,'') = NULLIF(mr.reportMonth,'')
    AND NULLIF(al.PlanMemberId,'') = NULLIF(mr.PlanMemberId,'')
  LEFT JOIN SlimReportBase rb
    ON NULLIF(al.reportMonth,'') = NULLIF(rb.reportMonth,'')
    AND NULLIF(al.PlanMemberId,'') = NULLIF(rb.PlanMemberId,'')
  LEFT JOIN SlimAlertGroup ag
    ON NULLIF(al.alertGroupID,'') = NULLIF(ag.alertGroupID,'')
  LEFT JOIN SlimAlertResponseOption ars
    ON NULLIF(al.alertResponseOptionID,'') = NULLIF(ars.alertResponseOptionID,'')
  LEFT JOIN SlimAlertWorkflowQuery awq
    ON NULLIF(al.CDIAlertEntityDetailID,'') = NULLIF(awq.CDIAlertEntityDetailID,'')
  LEFT JOIN SlimCDIAlertQueryResponse aqr
    ON NULLIF(al.cdiAlertQueryResponseID,'') = NULLIF(aqr.cdiAlertQueryResponseID,'')
),
FinalOutput AS(
SELECT 
   IFNULL(monthKey,'011900') AS monthKey
  ,IFNULL(clientKey,-1) AS clientKey
  ,IFNULL(memberKey,-1)  AS memberKey
  ,IFNULL(planID,'')  AS planID
  ,isMemberActive
  ,IFNULL(lineOfBusiness,'')  AS lineOfBusiness
  ,isInReportBase
  ,IFNULL(pcpProviderKey,-1) AS pcpProviderKey
  ,IFNULL(apptProviderKey,-1) AS apptProviderKey
  ,CAST(SUM(alertsDistributedFlag) AS BIGINT) AS alertsDistributedCnt
  ,CAST(SUM(alertsReturnedFlag) AS BIGINT) AS alertsReturnedCnt
  ,CAST(SUM(alertsReturnedCompliant) AS BIGINT) AS alertsReturnedCompliantCnt
  ,CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT IsIncentiveUMARQualifiedPlanMemberId) AS BIGINT) AS isIncentiveUMARQualified
  ,CAST(COUNT(isIncentiveQualifiedAlertsAlertId) AS BIGINT) AS isIncentiveQualifiedAlerts
  ,CAST(SUM(droppedConditionsIdentified) AS BIGINT) AS droppedConditionsIdentifiedCnt
  ,CAST(SUM(droppedConditionsAddressed) AS BIGINT) AS droppedConditionsAddressedCnt
  ,CAST(SUM(droppedConditionsYesResponse) AS BIGINT) AS droppedConditionsYesResponseCnt
  ,CAST(SUM(droppedConditionsNoResponse) AS BIGINT) AS droppedConditionsNoResponseCnt
  ,CAST(SUM(droppedConditionsNullResponse) AS BIGINT) AS droppedConditionsNullResponseCnt
  ,CAST(SUM(opportunitiesIdentified) AS BIGINT) AS opportunitiesIdentifiedCnt
  ,CAST(SUM(opportunitiesAddressed) AS BIGINT) AS opportunitiesAddressedCnt
  ,CAST(SUM(opportunitiesYesResponse) AS BIGINT) AS opportunitiesYesResponseCnt
  ,CAST(SUM(opportunitiesNoResponse) AS BIGINT) AS opportunitiesNoResponseCnt
  ,CAST(SUM(opportunitiesnullResponse) AS BIGINT) AS opportunitiesnullResponseCnt
  ,CAST(SUM(starsIdentified) AS BIGINT) AS starsIdentifiedCnt
  ,CAST(SUM(starsAddressed) AS BIGINT) AS starsAddressedCnt
  ,CAST(SUM(alertsDistributedWithQueries) AS BIGINT) AS alertsDistributedWithQueriesCnt
  ,CAST(COUNT(alertsReturnedCompliantWithQueries) AS BIGINT) AS alertsReturnedCompliantWithQueriesCnt
  ,CAST(SUM(queriesDistributed) AS BIGINT) AS queriesDistributedCnt
  ,CAST(SUM(queriesReturned) AS BIGINT) AS queriesReturnedCnt
  ,CAST(SUM(queriesReturnedAddendedMR) AS BIGINT) AS queriesReturnedAddendedMRCnt
  ,CAST(SUM(queriesReturnedNoUpdateMR) AS BIGINT) AS queriesReturnedNoUpdateMRCnt
  ,CAST(COUNT(alertsDistributedWithStars) AS BIGINT) AS alertsDistributedWithStarsCnt
  ,CAST(COUNT(alertsReturnedWithStars) AS BIGINT) AS alertsReturnedWithStarsCnt
  ,CAST(COUNT(alertsReturnedCompliantWithStars) AS BIGINT) AS alertsReturnedCompliantWithStarsCnt
  ,CAST(COUNT(starsReturnedCompliant) AS BIGINT) AS starsReturnedCompliantCnt
  ,CAST(COUNT(starsAddressedReturnedCompliant) AS BIGINT) AS starsAddressedReturnedCompliantCnt
FROM BaseData
GROUP BY 
   IFNULL(monthKey,'011900')
  ,IFNULL(clientKey,-1)
  ,IFNULL(memberKey,-1)
  ,IFNULL(planID,'')
  ,isMemberActive
  ,IFNULL(lineOfBusiness,'')
  ,isInReportBase
  ,IFNULL(pcpProviderKey,-1)
  ,IFNULL(apptProviderKey,-1)
)
SELECT 
   hash(concat(
	 IfNull(monthKey, ""),
	 IfNull(clientKey, ""),
	 IfNull(memberKey, ""), 
 	 IfNull(pcpProviderKey, ""),
	 IfNull(apptProviderKey, "")
     )) as factMonthlyMemberCDIAlertHash
  ,monthKey
  ,clientKey
  ,memberKey
  ,planID
  ,isMemberActive
  ,lineOfBusiness
  ,isInReportBase
  ,pcpProviderKey
  ,apptProviderKey
  ,alertsDistributedCnt
  ,alertsReturnedCnt
  ,alertsReturnedCompliantCnt
  ,isIncentiveUMARQualified
  ,isIncentiveQualifiedAlerts
  ,droppedConditionsIdentifiedCnt
  ,droppedConditionsAddressedCnt
  ,droppedConditionsYesResponseCnt
  ,droppedConditionsNoResponseCnt
  ,droppedConditionsNullResponseCnt
  ,opportunitiesIdentifiedCnt
  ,opportunitiesAddressedCnt
  ,opportunitiesYesResponseCnt
  ,opportunitiesNoResponseCnt
  ,opportunitiesnullResponseCnt
  ,starsIdentifiedCnt
  ,starsAddressedCnt
  ,alertsDistributedWithQueriesCnt
  ,alertsReturnedCompliantWithQueriesCnt
  ,queriesDistributedCnt
  ,queriesReturnedCnt
  ,queriesReturnedAddendedMRCnt
  ,queriesReturnedNoUpdateMRCnt
  ,alertsDistributedWithStarsCnt
  ,alertsReturnedWithStarsCnt
  ,alertsReturnedCompliantWithStarsCnt
  ,starsReturnedCompliantCnt
  ,starsAddressedReturnedCompliantCnt
  ,current_timestamp() AS createdDatetime
  ,current_timestamp() AS updatedDatetime
FROM FinalOutput
SubLayerProcessing.DupScript:
SELECT 
         monthKey
		,clientKey
		,memberKey
		,pcpProviderKey
		,apptProviderKey
      FROM tempSQLScript 
      GROUP BY 
         monthKey
		,clientKey
		,memberKey
		,pcpProviderKey
		,apptProviderKey
      HAVING COUNT(1) > 1
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript:
MERGE INTO DestinationTable t 
USING (
    SELECT 
       factMonthlyMemberCDIAlertHash
      ,monthKey
      ,clientKey
      ,memberKey
      ,planID
      ,isMemberActive
      ,lineOfBusiness
      ,isInReportBase
      ,pcpProviderKey
      ,apptProviderKey
      ,alertsDistributedCnt
      ,alertsReturnedCnt
      ,alertsReturnedCompliantCnt
      ,isIncentiveUMARQualified
      ,isIncentiveQualifiedAlerts
      ,droppedConditionsIdentifiedCnt
      ,droppedConditionsAddressedCnt
      ,droppedConditionsYesResponseCnt
      ,droppedConditionsNoResponseCnt
      ,droppedConditionsNullResponseCnt
      ,opportunitiesIdentifiedCnt
      ,opportunitiesAddressedCnt
      ,opportunitiesYesResponseCnt
      ,opportunitiesNoResponseCnt
      ,opportunitiesnullResponseCnt
      ,starsIdentifiedCnt
      ,starsAddressedCnt
      ,alertsDistributedWithQueriesCnt
      ,alertsReturnedCompliantWithQueriesCnt
      ,queriesDistributedCnt
      ,queriesReturnedCnt
      ,queriesReturnedAddendedMRCnt
      ,queriesReturnedNoUpdateMRCnt
      ,alertsDistributedWithStarsCnt
      ,alertsReturnedWithStarsCnt
      ,alertsReturnedCompliantWithStarsCnt
      ,starsReturnedCompliantCnt
      ,starsAddressedReturnedCompliantCnt
      ,createdDatetime
      ,updatedDatetime
    FROM tempSQLScript) s 
		  ON t.monthKey = s.monthKey
		  AND t.clientKey = s.clientKey
		  AND t.memberKey = s.memberKey
		  AND t.pcpProviderKey = s.pcpProviderKey
		  AND t.apptProviderKey = s.apptProviderKey
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE 
SET 
	 factMonthlyMemberCDIAlertHash = s.factMonthlyMemberCDIAlertHash
	,monthKey = s.monthKey
	,clientKey = s.clientKey
	,memberKey = s.memberKey
	,planID = s.planID
	,isMemberActive = s.isMemberActive
	,lineOfBusiness = s.lineOfBusiness
	,isInReportBase = s.isInReportBase
	,pcpProviderKey = s.pcpProviderKey
	,apptProviderKey = s.apptProviderKey
	,alertsDistributedCnt = s.alertsDistributedCnt
	,alertsReturnedCnt = s.alertsReturnedCnt
    ,alertsReturnedCompliantCnt = s.alertsReturnedCompliantCnt
	,isIncentiveUMARQualified = s.isIncentiveUMARQualified
	,isIncentiveQualifiedAlerts = s.isIncentiveQualifiedAlerts
	,droppedConditionsIdentifiedCnt = s.droppedConditionsIdentifiedCnt
	,droppedConditionsAddressedCnt = s.droppedConditionsAddressedCnt
	,droppedConditionsYesResponseCnt = s.droppedConditionsYesResponseCnt
	,droppedConditionsNoResponseCnt = s.droppedConditionsNoResponseCnt
	,droppedConditionsNullResponseCnt = s.droppedConditionsNullResponseCnt
	,opportunitiesIdentifiedCnt = s.opportunitiesIdentifiedCnt
	,opportunitiesAddressedCnt = s.opportunitiesAddressedCnt
	,opportunitiesYesResponseCnt = s.opportunitiesYesResponseCnt
	,opportunitiesNoResponseCnt = s.opportunitiesNoResponseCnt
	,opportunitiesnullResponseCnt = s.opportunitiesnullResponseCnt
	,starsIdentifiedCnt = s.starsIdentifiedCnt
	,starsAddressedCnt = s.starsAddressedCnt
    ,alertsDistributedWithQueriesCnt = s.alertsDistributedWithQueriesCnt
	,alertsReturnedCompliantWithQueriesCnt = s.alertsReturnedCompliantWithQueriesCnt
	,queriesDistributedCnt = s.queriesDistributedCnt
	,queriesReturnedCnt = s.queriesReturnedCnt
	,queriesReturnedAddendedMRCnt = s.queriesReturnedAddendedMRCnt
	,queriesReturnedNoUpdateMRCnt = s.queriesReturnedNoUpdateMRCnt
	,alertsDistributedWithStarsCnt = s.alertsDistributedWithStarsCnt
	,alertsReturnedWithStarsCnt = s.alertsReturnedWithStarsCnt
	,alertsReturnedCompliantWithStarsCnt = s.alertsReturnedCompliantWithStarsCnt
	,starsReturnedCompliantCnt = s.starsReturnedCompliantCnt
	,starsAddressedReturnedCompliantCnt = s.starsAddressedReturnedCompliantCnt
    --,createdDatetime = t.createdDatetime 
    ,updatedDatetime = s.updatedDatetime
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (
       factMonthlyMemberCDIAlertHash
      ,monthKey
      ,clientKey
      ,memberKey
      ,planID
      ,isMemberActive
      ,lineOfBusiness
      ,isInReportBase
      ,pcpProviderKey
      ,apptProviderKey
      ,alertsDistributedCnt
      ,alertsReturnedCnt
      ,alertsReturnedCompliantCnt
      ,isIncentiveUMARQualified
      ,isIncentiveQualifiedAlerts
      ,droppedConditionsIdentifiedCnt
      ,droppedConditionsAddressedCnt
      ,droppedConditionsYesResponseCnt
      ,droppedConditionsNoResponseCnt
      ,droppedConditionsNullResponseCnt
      ,opportunitiesIdentifiedCnt
      ,opportunitiesAddressedCnt
      ,opportunitiesYesResponseCnt
      ,opportunitiesNoResponseCnt
      ,opportunitiesnullResponseCnt
      ,starsIdentifiedCnt
      ,starsAddressedCnt
      ,alertsDistributedWithQueriesCnt
      ,alertsReturnedCompliantWithQueriesCnt
      ,queriesDistributedCnt
      ,queriesReturnedCnt
      ,queriesReturnedAddendedMRCnt
      ,queriesReturnedNoUpdateMRCnt
      ,alertsDistributedWithStarsCnt
      ,alertsReturnedWithStarsCnt
      ,alertsReturnedCompliantWithStarsCnt
      ,starsReturnedCompliantCnt
      ,starsAddressedReturnedCompliantCnt
      ,createdDatetime
      ,updatedDatetime
)
VALUES (
     s.factMonthlyMemberCDIAlertHash
    ,s.monthKey
    ,s.clientKey
    ,s.memberKey
    ,s.planID
    ,s.isMemberActive
    ,s.lineOfBusiness
    ,s.isInReportBase
    ,s.pcpProviderKey
    ,s.apptProviderKey
    ,s.alertsDistributedCnt
    ,s.alertsReturnedCnt
    ,s.alertsReturnedCompliantCnt
    ,s.isIncentiveUMARQualified
    ,s.isIncentiveQualifiedAlerts
    ,s.droppedConditionsIdentifiedCnt
    ,s.droppedConditionsAddressedCnt
    ,s.droppedConditionsYesResponseCnt
    ,s.droppedConditionsNoResponseCnt
    ,s.droppedConditionsNullResponseCnt
    ,s.opportunitiesIdentifiedCnt
    ,s.opportunitiesAddressedCnt
    ,s.opportunitiesYesResponseCnt
    ,s.opportunitiesNoResponseCnt
    ,s.opportunitiesnullResponseCnt
    ,s.starsIdentifiedCnt
    ,s.starsAddressedCnt
    ,s.alertsDistributedWithQueriesCnt
    ,s.alertsReturnedCompliantWithQueriesCnt
    ,s.queriesDistributedCnt
    ,s.queriesReturnedCnt
    ,s.queriesReturnedAddendedMRCnt
    ,s.queriesReturnedNoUpdateMRCnt
    ,s.alertsDistributedWithStarsCnt
    ,s.alertsReturnedWithStarsCnt
    ,s.alertsReturnedCompliantWithStarsCnt
    ,s.starsReturnedCompliantCnt
    ,s.starsAddressedReturnedCompliantCnt
    ,s.createdDatetime
    ,NULL
    )
